cluster_metadata.label: Essential Spender
cluster_metadata.description: Primarily spends on necessities like rent, utilities, and groceries with regular patterns

cluster_metadata.label: Lifestyle Enthusiast
cluster_metadata.description: Higher spending on dining, entertainment, and shopping with variable patterns

cluster_metadata.label: Conservative Saver
cluster_metadata.description: Below-average spending with focus on essential categories only

cluster_metadata.label: Impulse Buyer
cluster_metadata.description: Irregular spending bursts, often during evenings and weekends on non-essentials

cluster_metadata.label: Micro (< ₹500)
cluster_metadata.description: Small daily transactions like chai, snacks, auto rides

cluster_metadata.label: Small (₹500 - ₹2K)
cluster_metadata.description: Regular purchases like groceries, fuel, dining

cluster_metadata.description: Significant purchases like shopping, travel bookings

cluster_metadata.label: Large (₹10K+)
cluster_metadata.description: Major expenses like rent, EMI, insurance, large purchases

cluster_metadata.label: Early Bird
cluster_metadata.description: Morning transactions (6 AM - 12 PM): commute, groceries, bills

cluster_metadata.label: Afternoon Active
cluster_metadata.description: Midday spending (12 PM - 5 PM): lunch, errands, shopping

cluster_metadata.label: Evening Spender
cluster_metadata.description: Evening transactions (5 PM - 9 PM): dining, entertainment, shopping

cluster_metadata.label: Night Owl
cluster_metadata.description: Late night activity (9 PM - 6 AM): subscriptions, late-night orders, auto-debits

cluster_metadata.description: Dominated by rent, utilities, groceries, and insurance

cluster_metadata.description: Primarily food delivery, dining out, and ride-hailing services

cluster_metadata.description: E-commerce, fashion, entertainment, and personal care

cluster_metadata.description: EMIs, insurance, subscriptions, and recurring payments

cluster_metadata.label: Anomalous Transactions
cluster_metadata.description: Unusual transactions that deviate significantly from normal patterns — large amounts, odd timing, or rare categories
